rulings.Case Title: CARY CARTER ET AL VS. RAYMOND GUARAGLIA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Defendants Hazel Guaraglia And Raymond Guaraglia To Strike Plaintiffs Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday July 5, 2016, line 2. rulings.Case Title: ZAFIRI LIMITED PARTNERSHIP VS. WILLIAM SEELEY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Admissions Deemed Admitted And Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday July 5, 2016, line 3. PLAINTIFF ZAFIRI LIMITED PARTNERSHIP Notice of Motion and Motion For Admissions Deemed Admitted And Sanctions DENIED. This is an unlawful detainer action in which judgment was possession was entered on August 8, 2014. Defendant vacated the premises on August 12, 2014. (Declaration of Nick Tarlson dated December 2, 2014). As of August 8, 2014 the unlawful detainer action was no longer "pending." Plaintiff failed to properly convert this action into a civil action. SFLR 2.11H is not applicable. = (501/REQ)
